title: Cae Blaen-dyffryn
summary:
Cae Blaen-dyffryn is a Site of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI) in Carmarthenshire,  Wales.
The SSSI is rectangular in shape, approximately 0.15 miles (0.24 km) by 0.09 miles (0.14 km) in size, and located some 2 miles (3.2 km) south-south-east of Cwmann. Its southern boundary abuts the A482 road.
